---
title: "Han (Simon) Yan"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
---

::: {.column-screen .gradient-banner}
::: {.container .header-container}

# Han (Simon) Yan
### Bridging Quantitative Modeling with Business-Critical AI Assurance
Master of Professional Studies in Information Science @ Cornell University

:::
:::

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8 .profile-text}
I am a Data Science specialist at **Cornell University** focusing on **Assurance AI Technology**. My mission is to ensure that AI systems are not only intelligent but also robust, transparent, and reliable.

By leveraging my academic foundation in **Stochastic Processes**, **Markov Chains**, and **Monte Carlo Simulations**, I architect scalable data solutions that bridge the gap between complex mathematical theory and actionable business integrity.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.glass-card}
### ✉️ Connect

- [**LinkedIn**](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sy31)
- [**GitHub**](https://github.com/hy86652)
- [**Email**](mailto:hyan86652@gmail.com)
- **Location**: Ithaca, NY

:::
:::

:::

---

## 🛠️ Technical Ecosystem

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .tech-card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
#### **AI & Modeling**
- Machine Learning (Scikit-learn)
- Monte Carlo Simulation
- Markov Chains & Stochastic Processes
- Probability & Statistics
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .tech-card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
#### **Data Engineering**
- Python (Pandas, NumPy)
- R (Tidyverse, ggplot2)
- SQL & ETL Pipelines
- Docker & Git
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .tech-card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
#### **Visualization & GIS**
- Mapbox & Leaflet APIs
- Tableau
- Matplotlib / Seaborn
- Interactive Dashboards
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

## 📊 Core Expertise: Assurance & Quant Research

### **High-Stakes Data Reliability**

During my tenure at **Central China Securities**, I architected an automated ETL pipeline processing **100K+ daily entries**. I implemented rigorous cleaning logic and outlier handling — the bedrock of **Assurance AI** — to ensure the stability of 10+ multi-factor alpha signals.

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'theme': 'base', 'themeVariables': {
  'primaryColor': '#ebf4ff',
  'primaryBorderColor': '#1a365d',
  'primaryTextColor': '#1a365d',
  'lineColor': '#f6ad55',
  'edgeLabelBackground': '#ffffff'
}}}%%
graph LR
    A([100K+ Daily Data]) -->|Pandas Core| B[[Cleaning Logic]]
    B --> C{Outlier Handling}
    C -->|Validation| D([Standardized Factors])
    D --> E[[Alpha Signal Optimization]]

    style C fill:#fffaf0,stroke:#f6ad55,stroke-width:2px
    style E fill:#1a365d,stroke:#1a365d,stroke-width:2px,color:#ffffff
```

### **Stochastic Modeling for Risk**

Applying **Markov Chains** and **Monte Carlo Simulations** to quantify uncertainty and model regime-switching behavior in financial time series — translating probabilistic outputs into interpretable risk metrics for business stakeholders.

---

## 💼 Experience

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .experience-card}
::: {.card-body}
### Central China Securities
**Data Science Intern** · 2023

- Built ETL pipeline handling 100K+ daily records with automated outlier detection
- Engineered 10+ multi-factor alpha signals with rigorous validation logic
- Reduced data processing errors by standardizing cleaning workflows in Python
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .experience-card}
::: {.card-body}
### Cornell University
**MPS in Information Science** · 2024–Present

- Specializing in AI Assurance, data reliability, and scalable ML systems
- Coursework: Stochastic Processes, Machine Learning, Data Engineering
- Focused on the intersection of quantitative finance and trustworthy AI
:::
:::
:::

:::

---

## 🎓 Education

| Degree | Institution | Year |
|--------|-------------|------|
| MPS, Information Science | Cornell University | 2024–Present |

---

::: {.footer-note}
*Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) · Last updated 2025*
:::
